commands.purpose: Send a rendered template to a real recipient via the specified provider (or default). Rate-limited to 10/day per operator. Production sends refused unless --allow-production.
Pull provider-side suppression list + sync missing entries. Runs weekly from schedule; can be invoked manually.
Manually add an address to the suppression list. --platform-wide creates an is_system=true row (super_admin only).
Revoke a suppression. Refused for hard_bounce/complaint entries unless --force + super_admin.
Soft-delete expired soft-bounce entries. Runs daily from schedule.
